title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama project: get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, push, list, delete, copy, show, create models via a simple async/sync client.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; identical API surface to the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama LLM & embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, admin panel.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI for managing Ollama models (pull, run, list, remove) with fzf integration.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot chat pane.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to call Ollama chat/completions inside no-code workflows.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB + LlamaIndex.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker Compose stacks for CPU & GPU (CUDA/ROCm) Ollama deployments.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with optional GPU nodes.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama (Spring Boot starter included).

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community .NET SDK for Ollama with both sync and async APIs.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-host Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings Ollama LLMs into channels/DMs with thread support.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger module to run Ollama models inside CI pipelines for generative tests or doc generation.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP client for Ollama with GenServer-backed connection pooling.

title: ollama-rustico
summary: Lightweight TUI dashboard for Ollama written in Rust with model metrics and logs.
